body.title: Akien: create Google AI Studio API key for inference proxy
body.result: done — Google AI Studio API key created; credentials in Igor's creds file
body.description:
The inference proxy now has a native GoogleSource that bypasses OpenRouter to get the 75% prompt caching discount on long payloads and access the free tier safety valve.

Akien needs to create a Google AI Studio API key and set it in the environment.

**Steps:**
1. Go to https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
2. Create a new API key
3. Add to ~/.unseen_university/.env: GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY=<your-key>
4. Verify with: python3 -c "from devices.inference.sources import GoogleSource; s=GoogleSource(); print(s.ping())"

**Affected files:** ~/.unseen_university/.env (gitignored)
**Design rules:** No live keys in source. .env is gitignored.
**Scope boundary:** Key creation and .env update only. No code changes.
**Completion criteria:** GoogleSource().ping() returns True and GoogleSource()._api_key() does not raise.
